title: Graph/Chart

posts.author: art (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I use a Monday board to track my leads status (new, in process, current, lost, etc)
Is there a way I can create a graph/chart where I can see the amount of new leads (amount of customers) “row’s” created by month?
If I could also do it by weeks of the year (1 through 52) would be great.

Thank you!

posts.author: art (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml: The idea would be to use the creation log column, I tried but I could not figure out a way to do it.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the dashboard, add new ‘chart’. THen use Creation log as your X column and group by week or month (depending on your preference).
